nasb.text: Of this church I was made a minister according to the stewardship from God bestowed on me for your benefit, so that I might fully carry out the preaching of the word of God,

esv.text: of which I became a minister according to the stewardship from God that was given to me for you, to make the word of God fully known,

ccb.text: 我受上帝的委派成为教会的仆人，要把上帝的道完整地传给你们。

csbs.text: 神为了你们的缘故赐给了我任务，我按照这任务成为教会的仆人，为要使神的话语完全传开。
